_comment: ADF pipeline EXCERPT for the JDBC-source / ADLS-Gen2-sink pattern. NOT importable as-is: the referenced linked services (Oracle, ADLS) and datasets (DS_Oracle_HRPRO, DS_ADLS_Landing_EmployeeHistory) are defined separately per environment and not shipped in this excerpt. Production engagements (1) precede this Copy activity with a Lookup activity that runs `SELECT MIN(history_id) AS lo, MAX(history_id) AS hi FROM hrpro.employee_history` and (2) bind the partition bounds to @activity('LookupBounds').output.firstRow.lo / .hi -- NOT to hardcoded constants. The values below are illustrative; you MUST replace them at deploy time via a Lookup or pipeline parameters.
name: PL_HRPRO_Bronze_Landing

source.oracleReaderQuery: SELECT MIN(history_id) AS lo, MAX(history_id) AS hi FROM hrpro.employee_history
SELECT history_id, emp_id, effective_date, end_date, dept_id, grade_id, salary, change_reason FROM hrpro.employee_history
